title: Account access
description: Create an account or continue with an existing session.

alerts.resetRequested: If this email exists in the system, a recovery link will be sent.
alerts.passwordResetDone: Password updated. You can now sign in with the new password.

starter.headline: Auth, validation, API state, and forms are wired from day one.
starter.description: The web app uses shared Zod contracts, TanStack Query for server state, TanStack Form for input state, and an API client that refreshes sessions through the backend.

reset.title: Password recovery
reset.requestDescription: Enter your email and the system will prepare a one-time password reset link.
reset.requestCardDescription: The link expires and replaces previous recovery links.
reset.confirmDescription: After the password changes, all active account sessions will be closed.
reset.confirmCardDescription: Enter the new password for this account.
